meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no testing knowledge (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no testing knowledge. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Pricing Strategy: Master Testing Without Experience
content.seo_description: Stop guessing your SaaS pricing. Learn how to implement robust testing and pricing strategies using Antigravity and Claude Code to scale your freelance business.
content.answer_block: Eliminate the 'testing anxiety' by automating your SaaS pricing logic through deterministic validation. By leveraging Claude Code to generate unit tests based on your pricing business rules and using Antigravity to simulate edge cases, you ensure financial accuracy, prevent revenue leaks, and deliver enterprise-grade reliability to every client.
content.intro:
You’ve built the MVP, the client is ecstatic, but then the cold dread sets in: the pricing logic. Without a formal background in software testing, you’re terrified that a rounding error or a race condition will bankrupt your client or, worse, destroy your reputation. It’s the silent killer of freelance careers—the fear that your code might break when it matters most.

But here is the secret: you don't need a degree in CS to build bulletproof systems. By shifting from manual validation to automated, AI-driven testing, you can treat pricing logic as an engineering challenge rather than a guessing game. Let's turn that anxiety into a competitive advantage.

steps.title: Define Pricing Business Rules
steps.description: Before writing code, clearly map out your pricing tiers and edge cases. We need a source of truth that the AI can reference.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a SaaS pricing model with three tiers (Basic, Pro, Enterprise). Include edge cases for leap-year billing, discount code stacking, and prorated mid-cycle upgrades.
steps.claude_code_command: claude create --file pricing_logic.ts --prompt 'Generate TypeScript interfaces for the pricing schema defined in Antigravity.'

steps.title: Generate Deterministic Unit Tests
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate unit tests that cover every logical branch of your pricing engine.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of Jest unit tests for the pricing engine, focusing on boundary values like zero-cost plans and maximum discount threshold overflows.

steps.title: Simulate Real-World Transactions
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate synthetic user data to stress-test the pricing engine under load.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a simulation script that generates 1,000 randomized user subscription events and calculates the total MRR, highlighting any discrepancies.

steps.title: Implement Defensive Error Handling
steps.description: Ensure the application fails gracefully. Pricing logic must never throw an unhandled exception.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the pricing controller to include a circuit breaker pattern and exhaustive try-catch blocks for all external payment gateway calls.

steps.title: Final QA and Regression Audit
steps.description: Perform a final sweep to ensure previous fixes haven't introduced new bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the entire codebase for potential floating-point math errors and ensure all currency calculations use integer-based arithmetic.

pro_tips: Always represent currency in cents as integers to avoid the infamous floating-point precision errors in JavaScript.
Use Claude Code to document your test cases as human-readable requirements; clients love seeing the 'why' behind the 'how'.
Implement 'Property-Based Testing' where the AI generates random inputs to find the specific edge case that breaks your logic.
Treat your pricing engine as a separate micro-service or isolated module to make it easier to audit and swap out later.
Automate your regression suite to run on every commit; this builds the 'trust' that allows you to charge premium rates.
content.next_steps: Deploy your validated pricing engine to a staging environment and run a smoke test against your production payment gateway credentials.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical authority to promise enterprise-grade reliability to every client you pitch. Stop fearing the code and start dominating the market with precision-engineered SaaS solutions. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
